findings.description: The source h2 section '拡張例' contains 3 h3 subsections (プロパティファイル名や格納場所を変更する / メッセージをデータベースで管理する / メッセージのフォーマット方法を変更する) with total plain text well exceeding 2000 characters (XML config alone ~1200 chars, Java code ~300 chars, surrounding text ~500 chars), but the knowledge file combines all three h3s into a single section s1 instead of splitting them into s1, s2, s3.
findings.source_evidence: RST source has three ~~ underlined h3 headings under the -- underlined h2 '拡張例'. The XML block for database message management alone spans ~18 lines with class names, property definitions, and comments.
